ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Company phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement type */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Name of the financial statement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial statement type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the financial statement (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of financial account (e.g., asset, liability, equity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement type */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial account */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the financial data was recorded */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the financial account on the given date */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial data (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data the point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point (e.g., dollars, euros, yen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data included in the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data included in the report (e.g., financial statement, account balance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the financial data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
